detail:
Done. The file is exactly 45 bytes — the required line (44 chars) plus a single trailing newline (`0a`), no extra blank line.

**Summary:** Created `docs/smoke-test.md` containing exactly the single line `laddy autonomous dev-loop smoke test passed.` with a trailing newline only, satisfying all three acceptance criteria. My change to the working tree is exactly one added file (verified via `git add -n` and byte inspection: 45 bytes, terminating in a lone `\n`). The pre-existing untracked `.laddy/tasks/smoke1/role-plan.json` is orchestrator-generated and outside my scope, so I left it untouched. No tests were written because the spec explicitly forbids touching `tests/` and any file other than the one named — this docs-only task exercises the loop's end-to-end path rather than adding testable product behavior. Known risk: none of substance; the change lands nothing beyond the documentation marker file by design.
